title: View Automation Action details when mouse hovers
excerpt: I have automations that create lists of subitems up to 30 items long.  When I want to edit these, I am forced to count visually from the top to find the one I want to edit.  There is no way in the automation editor scree…

posts.author: TrueLinksupport (Janinne)
posts.cookedHtml: I have automations that create lists of subitems up to 30 items long. When I want to edit these, I am forced to count visually from the top to find the one I want to edit. There is no way in the automation editor screen to differentiate quickly between steps unless you click into each one. It would be helpful if the details of the step appeared when you hovered your mouse over the step.

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @TrueLinksupport ,

Agree with you here, that would be useful. If it helps you at all, when we’re adding automations into our boards (or for clients), we always give them a label or description to help narrowing in times to search as described.

Happy Monday!
teameasy@easy-mondays.com
